arts.ttl: Tottenham boss Ange Postecoglou explains Nottingham Forest changes amid Europa League hope
arts.sum: Speaking to Sky Sports before the game with Forest, Postecoglou explained how he plans to use the Premier League to maintain momentum with the double-header with Bodo/Glimt in mind. Tottenham boss Ange Postecoglou has explained his thinking behind his team selection for Monday night's Premier League clash with Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: How to watch Spurs vs Nottingham Forest - TV channel, live stream, kick-off time
arts.sum: Yes, Sky Sports has chosen Spurs vs Forest as part of its weekly Premier League coverage, with the match taking centre stage for Monday Night Football. Tottenham's clash against Nottingham Forest is scheduled to kick off at 8pm on Monday, April 21, from the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Premier League issue explanation after goal disallowed in Tottenham vs Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Chris Wood was denied a goal in Nottingham Forest's match with Tottenham after a VAR check which utilised the Premier League's new semi-automated offside technology

arts.ttl: Tottenham Hotspur transfer news latest: Ange Postecoglou dealt blow in pursuit of 'rival' Premier League defender
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur reportedly receive a blow in their pursuit of a Premier League defender, while rumours grow about the futures of Micky van de Ven and Cristian Romero.

arts.ttl: Spurs vs. Nottingham Forest team news: Ange Postecoglou rotation? Does Anthony Elanga return?

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Nottingham Forest LIVE: Team news as visitors continue top-four push in Premier League

arts.ttl: Tottenham: Ange Postecoglou hails influential Dominic Solanke as Richarlison pushes for rare start
arts.sum: Dominic Solanke scored the goal which sent Spurs into the Europa League semi-finals, but could get a rest tonight against Nottingham Forest

arts.ttl: Dele Alli sends three-word message to former Tottenham teammate
arts.sum: The Belgian international was one of the most naturally gifted dribblers the game has seen and in a post recirculated on social media by Alli, has one particularly impressive stat. His skill and talent was noticed by his teammates with many now recalling how Dembele was one of the most naturally gifted players they ever shared a pitch with, but despite his talent the international's skills seems to be all but forgotten.

arts.sum: Sporting CP defensive midfielder Morten Hjulmand is on the radar of top European clubs heading into the summer transfer window. The Danish star is attracting great interest because of his technical and leadership skills, while Sporting remains open to selling the player for the right price.
